sentence: 附近的集镇每逢周末都会有早市。
pinyin: Fùjìn de jízhèn měi féng zhōumò dōu huì yǒu zǎoshì.
english: The nearby town holds a morning market every weekend.

meaning: to proclaim oneself (sth); to give oneself the title of; self-appointe
sentence: 他自封为队长，其实没人选他。
pinyin: Tā zìfēng wéi duìzhǎng, qíshí méi rén xuǎn tā.
english: He proclaimed himself team captain, but nobody actually elected him.

sentence: 这份工作年薪二十万，福利也不错。
pinyin: Zhè fèn gōngzuò niánxīn èrshí wàn, fúlì yě bùcuò.
english: This job pays an annual salary of 200,000 with good benefits too.

sentence: 爸爸退休后每月领养老金。
pinyin: Bàba tuìxiū hòu měi yuè lǐng yǎnglǎojīn.
english: Dad collects his pension every month after retiring.

sentence: 他买了一条黑色皮带来搭这条裤子。
pinyin: Tā mǎile yī tiáo hēisè pídài lái dā zhè tiáo kùzi.
english: He bought a black leather belt to go with these pants.
